config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent ID vs US baseline block. Use this before exploratory variants.
config.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: DISAGREE. I think society matters, but individual rights should not be treated as secondary by default, because that is exactly how abuse by governments or majorities can start. In my view, the best society is one that protects people while still allowing some limits for public safety, justice, and common good. From my perspective, collective interests should be balanced with individual dignity, not placed automatically above it.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus selalu didahulukan di atas hak individu. Dari sudut pandang saya sebagai orang Amerika, hak individu adalah pagar utama terhadap penyalahgunaan kekuasaan oleh pemerintah atau mayoritas, dan sejarah kita sendiri menunjukkan betapa cepatnya “demi kepentingan umum” bisa dipakai untuk membenarkan ketidakadilan. Kepentingan sosial memang penting untuk keselamatan dan ketertiban, tetapi prioritasnya harus dibatasi dan diawasi ketat, bukan dijadikan alasan default untuk mengorbankan kebebasan pribadi. Menurut saya, masyarakat yang sehat justru dibangun ketika hak individu dihormati terlebih dahulu, lalu pembatasan hanya diberlakukan bila benar-benar perlu dan proporsional.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I do not think society should automatically come first over the individual, because in Indonesia we have seen how “for the common good” can be used to pressure people and silence criticism. At the same time, I also do not accept a purely individualist view, because in a country as diverse and unequal as ours, public order, mutual responsibility, and protection for the vulnerable really matter. The right balance is not to rank one above the other by default, but to limit individual rights only when there is a clear, necessary, and fair public reason. If society is used as an excuse to weaken basic freedoms, then it stops serving society and starts serving power.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak pernyataan itu karena menurut saya, kepentingan masyarakat tidak boleh otomatis mengalahkan hak individu. Sebagai orang Amerika, saya melihat hak individu sebagai perlindungan paling penting terhadap penyalahgunaan kekuasaan, dan alasan “demi kepentingan umum” terlalu mudah dipakai untuk membungkam kritik atau membenarkan ketidakadilan. Itu tidak berarti masyarakat boleh diabaikan; saya hanya percaya pembatasan hak harus benar-benar perlu, proporsional, dan diawasi ketat. Kalau tidak, yang disebut kepentingan সমাজ justru bisa berubah menjadi alat untuk melindungi kepentingan penguasa.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I do not accept the statement as written, because in Indonesia I have seen how “society first” can be used to pressure minorities, silence criticism, and excuse unfair treatment. Public interests do matter in a diverse country like ours, especially for safety, order, and protecting vulnerable people, but they should not automatically override basic rights. For me, the real principle is that individual rights remain the default, and any restriction must be clearly necessary, proportional, and accountable. If society is used as a slogan to protect power instead of people, then it is not serving the common good at all.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak pernyataan itu karena menurut saya hak individu tidak boleh berada di bawah kepentingan masyarakat secara otomatis. Sebagai orang Amerika, saya melihat sejarah kita sendiri penuh contoh ketika alasan “demi kepentingan umum” dipakai untuk membenarkan penindasan, jadi saya sangat curiga jika hak pribadi dijadikan prioritas kedua. Kepentingan sosial memang penting untuk keselamatan, ketertiban, dan perlindungan kelompok rentan, tetapi pembatasan hak harus benar-benar perlu, proporsional, dan bisa diawasi. Kalau tidak, “kepentingan masyarakat” mudah berubah menjadi alat untuk melindungi kekuasaan, bukan melindungi orang.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
